sqlMap.select: /*DialogReport070OrderYmdModify.selectDialogReport070OList*/ SELECT A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , A.ORDER_YMD_SEQ AS ORDER_YMD_SEQ , A.ORDER_YMD AS ORDER_YMD FROM TB_REPORT070_O A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.ORDER_YMD
sqlMap.insert: /*DialogReport070OrderYmdModify.insertDialogReport070O*/ INSERT INTO TB_REPORT070_O ( FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , ORDER_YMD_SEQ , ORDER_YMD , DEL_YN , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE , MODI_ID , MODI_DATE) VALUES (#fisYear# , #bgtDgr# , (SELECT NVL(MAX(ORDER_YMD_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_REPORT070_O Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND Z.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr#) , #orderYmd# , 'N' , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP)
sqlMap.update: /*DialogReport070OrderYmdModify.updateDialogReport070O*/ UPDATE TB_REPORT070_O SET ORDER_YMD = #orderYmd# , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND ORDER_YMD_SEQ = #orderYmdSeq#

/*DialogReport070OrderYmdModify.deleteDialogReport070O*/ UPDATE TB_REPORT070_O SET DEL_YN = 'Y' , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND ORDER_YMD_SEQ = #orderYmdSeq#
sqlMap.select: /*DialogReport070OrderYmdModify.selectDialogReport070OKeyList*/ SELECT A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , A.ORDER_YMD_SEQ AS ORDER_YMD_SEQ FROM TB_REPORT070_O A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr#
